name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Registration via cscript
notes: This Building Block detects when the registration of a VSS/VDS Provider as a COM+ application.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Registration via cscript on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of cscript.exe

when the event matches LOWER("Command") ILIKE '%-register%' AND ("Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.22000.0\x64%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.19041.0\x64%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.17763.0\x64%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Registration via cscript on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of cscript.exe

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") ILIKE '%-register%' AND ("Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.22000.0\x64%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.19041.0\x64%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.0.17763.0\x64%') AQL filter query
